rewritten_requirements: The system shall assign a manager and at least one member of staff when a campaign is created.
The system shall trigger the transition from the Completed state to the Paid state only when the total amount due for the Campaign has been completely paid.
The system shall trigger a reflexive transition from the Completed state for any payment event that does not reduce the amount due to zero or less.
The system shall modify the guard conditions of the Completed state when an overpayment results in automatic generation of a refund.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When a campaign is created, assign a manager and at least one member of staff to it.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Execution of these operations ensures that when a campaign is created a manager and at least one member of staff are assigned to it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Trigger the transition from the Completed state to the Paid state only if the total amount due for the Campaign has been completely paid.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The transition from the Completed state to the Paid state has a guard condition that only allows the transition to fire if total amount due (paymentDue) for the Campaign has been completely paid

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Trigger the reflexive transition from the Completed state for any payment event that does not reduce the amount due to zero or less.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The reflexive transition from the Completed state models any payment event that does not reduce the amount due to zero or less.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Modify the guard conditions of the Completed state if an overpayment results in automatic generation of a refund.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Since the action that results from an overpayment is different from the action that results from a payment that reduces paymentDue to zero, a new transition is needed from the Completed state to the Paid state.
